mapper.sql: fp_threshold_rule r left join fp_metric_definition d on d.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and d.id = r.metric_definition_id
mapper.select: select from where order by r.updated_at desc, r.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from fp_threshold_rule r where
select count(1) from fp_threshold_rule where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_threshold_rule where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true
select count(1) from fp_threshold_rule where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and scope_type = #{scopeType}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_threshold_rule ( id, tenant_id, rule_code, rule_name, metric_definition_id, scope_type, object_type, object_id, object_code, object_name, topology_id, topology_element_id, topology_element_type, conditions_json, evaluation_window_sec, consecutive_count, recovery_policy, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{ruleCode}, #{ruleName}, #{metricDefinitionId}, #{scopeType}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{objectCode}, #{objectName}, #{topologyId}, #{topologyElementId}, #{topologyElementType}, #{conditionsJson}, #{evaluationWindowSec}, #{consecutiveCount}, #{recoveryPolicy}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update fp_threshold_rule set rule_code = #{ruleCode}, rule_name = #{ruleName}, metric_definition_id = #{metricDefinitionId}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, object_type = #{objectType}, object_id = #{objectId}, object_code = #{objectCode}, object_name = #{objectName}, topology_id = #{topologyId}, topology_element_id = #{topologyElementId}, topology_element_type = #{topologyElementType}, conditions_json = #{conditionsJson}, evaluation_window_sec = #{evaluationWindowSec}, consecutive_count = #{consecutiveCount}, recovery_policy = #{recoveryPolicy}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_threshold_rule where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
